programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Doug awaits Hilary's arrival at Arthur's party. Carl and Anna are caught up in a bidding war over Mill Cottage.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Rita makes a decision about Tony's tender for the Kabin and, as tempers fray in the cafe, Becky and Roy reveal a few home truths. Lloyd gives Vernon a roof over his head.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Jason offers Becky a bed at his place after an embittered Roy throws her out. Vernon drowns his sorrows with Lloyd, while Tony and Carla weigh up how to handle Kevin.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. Nick and Jo are worried about a disruptive village schoolboy. Greengrass hatches a plan to 'borrow' Lord Ashfordly's racehorse.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: The police investigate a robbery at a wine and spirits warehouse, and Nick discovers the reasons behind Ventress's uncharacteristic behaviour.

programs.title: Grace
programs.desc: A student is found dead, and Grace digs into mysterious happenings on a university campus. When things take a more sinister turn, it's a race to find the killer.
